title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.0 - New cards: Deceptive Cadence (use all Vigor -> Block), Encore (retain Vigor after using it), Swing (invert all buffs & debuffs each turn). Reworked Have Fun into Enjoy the Ride (reactive Invert). Renamed 8 cards. Requires BaseLib.
